name: cross-session-memory-bridge
description: Repo-local Codex plugin wrapper for the cross-session memory bridge.

interface.shortDescription: Resume and sync Codex work across sessions.
interface.longDescription: Repo-local Codex plugin wrapper for the existing Postgres-backed cross-session memory bridge, including resume, sync, handoff, search, and maintenance tools.
defaultPrompt: Resume context for this coding task from prior sessions.
Mirror this turn into bridge memory for later handoff.
Build a handoff summary before we stop.
